title: LEGO Star Wars 75433 Jango Fett's Starship - Play & Display Toy with Rotating Wings & 3 Minifigures incl. Boba Fett - Attack of the Clones Gift for 9+ Year Old Boys & Fans
features: LEGO Star Wars: Attack of the Clones starship – Role-play as Star Wars bounty hunter characters and play out exciting adventures with this building toy for 9+ year old boys and girls
Authentically detailed LEGO Star Wars starship – Features an opening cockpit for 2 LEGO minifigures, 4 stud shooters, a seismic-charge-dropping function and wings that rotate with gravity
3 LEGO Star Wars minifigures – The building set includes Jango Fett with 2 blaster pistols and a jetpack, Young Boba Fett and Lama Su, for kids to role-play fun adventures
Play and display model – Also includes a service cart with a seat for a LEGO minifigure and ammunition storage; the cart can be used to move the starship or as a display stand
LEGO Star Wars gift idea for kids – This buildable Star Wars toy makes a great birthday gift for 9+ year old boys and girls who are Star Wars: Attack of the Clones fans
Intuitive instructions – The LEGO Builder app leads kids on an intuitive building adventure where they can rotate a 3D digital version of their construction models as they build, and more
Join in the fun – Look out for Jango Fett’s Firespray-Class Starship set for adults (75409, sold separately), a companion set that allows kids and adults to enjoy building at the same time
description: From the manufacturer Unique building toy Fantastic gift for LEGO Star Wars lovers Put the excitement of Star Wars: Attack of the Clones adventures in the hands of kids with this brilliantly detailed LEGO brick-built version of Jango Fett’s Starship for play and eye-catching display. Launch into action Supercool Star Wars vehicle This buildable model of Jango Fett’s iconic starship has everything budding bounty hunters need, including a cockpit for 2 LEGO Star Wars minifigures, wings that rotate with gravity, 4 stud shooters and more. Previous page Seismic charge-dropping function Drop seismic charges on enemies. Service cart Use the service cart to move the starship in play scenarios or as a display stand between playtimes. Next page Ready for role play 3 LEGO Star Wars characters This building set includes a Jango Fett, Young Boba Fett and Lama Su LEGO Star Wars minifigures, and Jango Fett is equipped with 2 blaster pistols and a jetpack for battle play. Top Star Wars fan gifts Build, play and collect Inspire kids’ creativity with fun building toys from the huge LEGO Star Wars range (each set sold separately), featuring brick-built models of iconic Star Wars vehicles and legendary characters. Previous page Republic Juggernaut Let kids lead their own heroic Star Wars: The Clone Wars battle missions with the Republic Juggernaut, an awesome 10-wheeler with tilt-steering. V-19 Torrent Starfighter Join forces with General Obi-Wan Kenobi against Asajj Ventress, and swoosh into action with the V-19 Torrent Starfighter play vehicle for ages 9 and over. Battle of Felucia Separatist MTT Kids become the heroes in their own epic battle for control of the planet Felucia against Battle Droids deployed from the brick-built Separatist MTT. Next page
